assertions.description: The 4-layer board uses 0.1mm-class track spacing, correctly flagged as requiring advanced process (tier='advanced'). Single DFM violation for track_spacing=0.1011mm vs 0.127mm standard limit is accurate. VREG_LX switching node appears in power_net_routing, which is slightly odd but not harmful.
